hero.sub: One hundred and seventeen variables per neighborhood — crime rates, absorption velocity, seismic risk, service density — processed in real time so you decide with certainty, not hope.

colonias.sub: From Polanco to Doctores, each tile shows four analysis dimensions calculated from official sources — DENUE, FGJ, GTFS, SEDUVI. Switch dimensions to see the raw indicators behind each score.

comparator.sub: Place two neighborhoods side by side across six decision axes. Where the polygons diverge, there is your answer. Click any axis to read the explanation.

properties.sub: Each listing includes the neighborhood scores, 24-month price trend and projected appreciation — all in one card, no tab-switching.

ie.sub: Other portals add photos. DMX cross-references data sources no portal analyzes: Risk Atlas, DENUE, GTFS, FGJ. The result: data certainty, not marketing promises.
ie.feat1_desc: DENUE, FGJ, GTFS, SEDUVI, CDMX Risk Atlas. Updated weekly.
ie.feat2_desc: 97 variables processed per neighborhood. No advisor waiting.
ie.feat3_desc: DMX does not earn sales commissions. Intelligence is the product.

cta.sub: The most complete neighborhood intelligence map in Mexico City. The data that determines the price of your next decision.
